# Support & Troubleshooting

[The Pinboard Pin extension](https://github.com/Cito/Pinboard-Pin) is an independent, open-source client for [Pinboard.in](https://pinboard.in). It supplements the Pinboard bookmarking service, but it is developed and maintained separately and is **not** an official Pinboard project.

### Why is it so slow / not working?

In most cases, the problem is not this extension. The Pinboard service and API have sometimes been slow or unreliable, but this has usually been fixed quickly by Pinboard support after notification.

Common signs of service trouble:

* The extension says "Cannot check this page on Pinboard."
* Tags do not show up or auto completion is slow.
* Timeouts when saving.

If you are seeing these or similar issues, **please do not open a GitHub issue here.** I can fix problems in the extension, but I cannot do anything about a struggling backend.

If the Pinboard service is the problem, please contact the Pinboard service support:

**Contact:** [support@pinboard.in](mailto:support@pinboard.in)

If you have found an actual bug in the extension's UI or logic, feel free to open an issue. If Pinboard itself is slow, broken, or half-awake again, that is outside my control.
